lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你最近看起来很累，怎么回事？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ zuìjìn kàn qǐlái hěn lèi, zěnme huí shì?
lines.english: You look really tired lately, what's going on?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 尽管已经很累了，我还是每天加班到很晚。
lines.pinyin: Jǐnguǎn yǐjīng hěn lèi le, wǒ háishi měitiān jiābān dào hěn wǎn.
lines.english: Despite being very tired already, I still work overtime until late every day.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 与其这样拼命工作，不如注意一下身体。
lines.pinyin: Yǔqí zhèyàng pīnmìng gōngzuò, bùrú zhùyì yíxià shēntǐ.
lines.english: Rather than working yourself to death like this, you should take care of your health.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我也知道，但是不得不这样做，项目下周就要交了。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ yě zhīdào, dànshì bùdébù zhèyàng zuò, xiàngmù xià zhōu jiù yào jiāo le.
lines.english: I know, but I have no choice. The project is due next week.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 一旦交了项目，你就好好休息吧。
lines.pinyin: Yídàn jiāo le xiàngmù, nǐ jiù hǎohǎo xiūxi ba.
lines.english: Once you submit the project, take a good rest.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What major do you want to study?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我想学艺术，但是大家都说未必能找到好工作。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng xué yìshù, dànshì dàjiā dōu shuō wèibì néng zhǎo dào hǎo gōngzuò.
lines.english: I want to study art, but everyone says you may not find a good job.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 凡是热爱自己专业的人，都会做得很好。
lines.pinyin: Fánshì rè'ài zìjǐ zhuānyè de rén, dōu huì zuò de hěn hǎo.
lines.english: Everyone who loves their field will do well.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 宁可做自己喜欢的事，我也不想为了钱选一个不喜欢的专业。
lines.pinyin: Nìngkě zuò zìjǐ xǐhuān de shì, wǒ yě bù xiǎng wèile qián xuǎn yí gè bù xǐhuān de zhuānyè.
lines.english: I would rather do what I love than choose a major I don't like just for money.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 刚开始工作，难免会辛苦一些，但是值得。
lines.pinyin: Gāng kāishǐ gōngzuò, nánmiǎn huì xīnkǔ yìxiē, dànshì zhíde.
lines.english: Starting out will inevitably be harder, but it's worth it.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 四川菜以辣为主，你吃得惯吗？
lines.pinyin: Sìchuān cài yǐ là wéi zhǔ, nǐ chī de guàn ma?
lines.english: Sichuan food is mainly spicy. Can you handle it?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我连不太辣的都受不了，何况正宗的四川菜。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ lián bú tài là de dōu shòu bù liǎo, hékuàng zhèngzōng de Sìchuān cài.
lines.english: I can't even handle mildly spicy food, let alone authentic Sichuan cuisine.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 不过尽管很辣，味道还是非常好的。
lines.pinyin: Búguò jǐnguǎn hěn là, wèidào háishi fēicháng hǎo de.
lines.english: But despite being very spicy, the flavor is really excellent.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 那我试试吧。与其怕辣不敢吃，不如大胆尝一尝。
lines.pinyin: Nà wǒ shìshi ba. Yǔqí pà là bù gǎn chī, bùrú dàdǎn cháng yì cháng.
lines.english: Then let me try. Rather than being afraid of spice and not daring to eat, I should be bold and give it a taste.
